value: I understand how stressful that is—a hacked account is serious. To help you regain control of your Apple ID, I'll need a couple of details: the email address associated with your Apple ID and any information you have about when you first noticed the unauthorized phone number. In the meantime, you can try visiting iforgot.apple.com to initiate a password reset, which may give you options to verify your identity through alternative methods like a recovery email or security questions. Once you provide those details, I can guide you through the next steps to fully secure your account.
